Cranbourne - Friday, 10 April 2026

Race 1 - 7:15 am Ladbrokes Popular Srm Maiden Plate (1200m)

Total prize: Prize $45000. Maiden, Set Weights, Three-Years-Old and Upwards, No sex restriction, Maiden Set Weights or WFA flat

Tips: 3 2 4 1 WHITE HOT MAMA first-up after 23 week spell and in the money last start running second at Warrnambool, key chance. I'M SAVVY AS placed at long odds last start at Sale when resuming and keep an eye on a Reece Goodwin trained horse, the real danger in the race. CHOICE ENCOUNTER first starter and from a strong camp, looks threatening. BEAU STRADA placed when fresh and ran 14 lengths back from the winner last start at Yarra Valley, could upset.
